transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Hi, can you help me make a schedule for tomorrow?

transcript.speaker: system
transcript.content: Absolutely. What appointments or tasks do you want to include?

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: I need time for class, lunch, and a study session.

transcript.speaker: system
transcript.content: A good draft would include class in the morning, lunch around noon, and a study block in the afternoon.
